mapper.update: UPDATE network_workspace_state SET workspace_status = #{workspaceStatus}, current_intent_version = #{currentIntentVersion}, current_plan_version = #{currentPlanVersion}, current_config_version = #{currentConfigVersion}, current_execution_version = #{currentExecutionVersion}, current_validation_version = #{currentValidationVersion}, current_repair_version = #{currentRepairVersion}, current_artifact_refs_json = #{currentArtifactRefsJson}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT task_id, workspace_status, current_intent_version, current_plan_version, current_config_version, current_execution_version, current_validation_version, current_repair_version, current_artifact_refs_json, update_time FROM network_workspace_state WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
